headlines.headline: Calvos Genomics warns of supply chain disruptions affecting Middle East operations

headlines.headline: Calvos Genomics announces breakthrough in automated logistics

headlines.headline: Xelvol Biotech faces class action over automated logistics service disruption

sentiment.reasoning: Service disruption leading to a class action lawsuit indicates significant operational failure and legal risk that will weigh on the company's performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
